title: Support group and community change management processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support group and community change management processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify changes occurring at group and community levels
